channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 5B: fire-brigade operation
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 30.06.2026]

item.title: 11A: fire-brigade operation
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: fire-brigade operation. [On 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: fire-brigade operation.
[On 30.06.2026]

item.title: 37A: fire-brigade operation
item.description: The line 37A is redirected towards Brigittenauer Brücke between Spittelau S U and Höchstädtplatz via Klosterneuburger Straße, Wexstraße, Stromstraße. [On 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The line 37A is redirected towards Brigittenauer Brücke between Spittelau S U and Höchstädtplatz via Klosterneuburger Straße, Wexstraße, Stromstraße.
[On 30.06.2026]

item.title: 69A: construction works Gänsbachergasse
item.description: Because of pipeline works in the Gänsbachergasse / Schlechtastraße line is redirected to 69A. [06.07.2026 – 10.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of pipeline works in the Gänsbachergasse / Schlechtastraße line is redirected to 69A.
[06.07.2026 – 10.07.2026]

item.title: 14A: construction works Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz
item.description: Due to construction works in the range Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz / Gumpendorfer Straße, the line 14A is short-run. [07.07.2026 – 16.08.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works in the range Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz / Gumpendorfer Straße, the line 14A is short-run.
[07.07.2026 – 16.08.2027]

item.title: 25: Heat damage line 25: Einstieg for line 26 (Strebersdorf)
98A: construction works
item.description: The line 98A is redirected in both directions between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Jägermaiszufahrt via Biberhaufenweg - Plattensteinergasse - Lobaugasse. [On 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The line 98A is redirected in both directions between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Jägermaiszufahrt via Biberhaufenweg - Plattensteinergasse - Lobaugasse.
[On 30.06.2026]

item.title: 57A: roadworks
item.description: Because of roadworks in the Gumpendorfer Straße between Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz and Laimgrubengasse, the line 57A operating short-running becomes the line Laimgrubengasse. [07.07.2026 – 16.08.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of roadworks in the Gumpendorfer Straße between Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz and Laimgrubengasse, the line 57A operating short-running becomes the line Laimgrubengasse.
[07.07.2026 – 16.08.2027]

item.title: 66A/N66: Grenzackerstraße
item.description: Stop change of lines 66A and N66 towards Liesing S Stop: Grenzackerstraße From: Laxenburger Straße 104 to Raxstraße To: about 30 Meter towards … [13.07.2026 – 13.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of lines 66A and N66 towards Liesing S Stop: Grenzackerstraße From: Laxenburger Straße 104 to Raxstraße To: about 30 Meter towards …
[13.07.2026 – 13.07.2027]
